summary: End-to-end browser regression of the METFPA DB-layer migration (separate _metfpa DB -> shared DB_NAME with metfpa_ collection prefix) on preview URL https://etat-progression.preview.emergentagent.com. All 6 acceptance areas PASS: (1) 4-role login + landing + role-specific sidebar all OK; (2) new specific FR 401 error 'Adresse e-mail ou mot de passe incorrect.' shown for both wrong-password and unknown-email, generic 'Une erreur est survenue' NOT shown; (3) data integrity after migration is intact — cabinet KPIs+decisions render, budget shows 'milliards FCFA', /kpi-cascade renders 19 indicators, /decisions and /risks load with content; (4) RBAC intact — cabinet_reader has NO nav-admin-users in sidebar and /admin-users shows access-denied page, direction_editor sees 5 DAF activity rows; (5) F5 reload preserves session (stays on /pilotage-directeur, not bounced to /login) and logout via sidebar user-menu-trigger -> logout-button works; (6) regression of reference pages /pnd-402, /politique-eftp, /strategie-digitale, /alignement, /accueil all load successfully with content (no 500s).

login_error_messages.wrong_password_for_admin: Adresse e-mail ou mot de passe incorrect. (PASS — specific FR message)
login_error_messages.wrong_password_no_generic: Generic 'Une erreur est survenue' NOT shown (PASS)
login_error_messages.unknown_email: Adresse e-mail ou mot de passe incorrect. (PASS — same 401 message)

validateur@metfpa.ci.sidebar_testid: sidebar-nav-me_validator (NOT sidebar-nav-validator as named in spec — but sidebar renders correctly with SUIVI ET VALIDATION group, Espace de validation, KPI cascade with 19 indicators)

data_integrity_after_migration./pilotage-directeur (cabinet): cabinet-kpis + cabinet-decisions render, 4 critical alerts + 11 elevated visible, 24 total — data populated correctly from metfpa_ prefixed collections
data_integrity_after_migration./kpi-cascade (validator): Renders exactly 19 indicators (Valeurs actuelles manquantes=19, En attente=19) — matches spec (PASS)

frontend_results.logout: logout-button is nested inside user-menu (must first click [data-testid=user-menu-trigger] in the top-right user avatar to reveal the dropdown with [data-testid=logout-button] (label 'Se déconnecter') — works correctly

critical_code_review_comments: DB-layer migration (backend/metfpa/db.py _PrefixedDB proxy with metfpa_ collection prefix on shared DB_NAME) is working end-to-end through the browser — all 4 role journeys load data correctly, 62-activity / 19-indicator dataset is intact, no 500s on any tested route.

Login error mapping in frontend/src/context/AuthContext.js correctly translates 401 to the specific FR message 'Adresse e-mail ou mot de passe incorrect.' for both wrong-password and unknown-email — the generic 'Une erreur est survenue' is no longer shown for credential errors (Section 7 requirement met).

Minor naming nit (NOT blocking): the validator role's sidebar testid renders as 'sidebar-nav-me_validator' instead of the 'sidebar-nav-validator' name used in the review request. The sidebar itself renders correctly (SUIVI ET VALIDATION group, Espace de validation, Revue du plan d'action, Qualité des données, Historique d'audit). Just a spec/implementation naming mismatch — either accept the current testid or rename it to sidebar-nav-validator to match the spec.

Minor UX observation (NOT blocking): the logout control [data-testid=logout-button] is hidden behind [data-testid=user-menu-trigger] (the avatar dropdown in the top-right). It is not directly visible in the sidebar footer, so any future Playwright test for logout must open the user-menu first. Working as designed; just worth documenting.
Session persistence on F5 confirmed — cookie/storage based session survives a hard reload without bouncing to /login (Section 5 requirement met).

success_rate.frontend: 100% — all 6 acceptance areas pass (login x4 roles, specific 401 FR error, data integrity post-migration, RBAC, session+logout, reference-page regression)

test_credentials: admin@metfpa.ci / Metfpa@2026Demo (admin); validateur@metfpa.ci / Metfpa@2026Demo (me_validator); direction.daf@metfpa.ci / Metfpa@2026Demo (direction_editor); cabinet@metfpa.ci / Metfpa@2026Demo (cabinet_reader). All 4 verified working on preview.
context_for_next_testing_agent: METFPA data now lives in collections named metfpa_frameworks, metfpa_users, metfpa_activities, etc. inside the shared DB_NAME (test_database) — single-DB architecture via _PrefixedDB proxy in backend/metfpa/db.py. /api/metfpa/health reports db=test_database, activities=62. Sidebar testids: sidebar-nav-admin, sidebar-nav-me_validator (NOT sidebar-nav-validator), sidebar-nav-direction_editor, sidebar-nav-cabinet_reader. To test logout: click [data-testid=user-menu-trigger] first (top-right avatar), then [data-testid=logout-button] appears in the dropdown. Wrong-password error text to assert: 'Adresse e-mail ou mot de passe incorrect.'. Cabinet sees nav-admin-users=false (RBAC). Direction DAF /plan-action shows exactly 5 activity rows. KPI cascade has exactly 19 indicators.
rca of the issue: n/a — DB-layer migration regression suite is fully green; no defects found through the browser.
